summary: Adapt the hand-authored relations/module commands to the reprinted engine: workspace-relative request paths (BaseURL now carries /api/v1/workspaces/{slug}) and the projects_issues table/projects_id FK that the reprinted sync writes to.
reason: The pre-reprint novels were written when BaseURL was the bare host and issues synced to an `issues`/`project_id` table. The restructured spec moved the workspace scope into servers:{slug} (so the client doubles the prefix on a full path) and the reprinted sync stores issues in projects_issues. Without these, `relations`/`module` calls 404 and module enrichment patches 0 issues.
validated_outcome: Isolated live sync: module_membership_synced reports modules 17, links 384, issues_patched 383 (baseline 17/383/382); 383 projects_issues rows carry non-empty module_ids. Pre-fix the enrichment 404'd then patched 0.
